market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Crypto PAC Fellowship halts support of Texas AG for Senate: Report
articles.description: After reporting more than $1.7 million to election officials, a crypto-aligned political action committee has reportedly backed out of advertising for a Texas Senate candidate.

articles.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
articles.description: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: Same players, bigger bets as crypto eyes a rebound
articles.description: Familiar players ramp up Bitcoin and Ether bets as markets hint at a rebound, while institutions test blockchain rails and US lawmakers stall on crypto rules this week.

articles.title: Bitcoin stays 'stalled' at $78K as oil threatens new risk-asset squeeze
articles.description: Bitcoin and risk assets faced an uphill struggle after the S&P 500 hit new all-time highs as analysis warned that BTC price support was at risk.

articles.title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
articles.description: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

articles.title: Trump's DOJ drops probe that stood in way of president's pick to run Federal Reserve
articles.description: The Justice Department passed an investigation of Fed Chair Jerome Powell to the Fed's own inspector, which could clear a confirmation path for Kevin Warsh.

articles.title: Solana confirms a bullish signal, which last sparked 100% SOL price gains
articles.description: A bullish signal from Solana’s MACD indicator hinted at a potential rally, though resistance at $90 could delay the recovery.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: 衛星之王爭奪戰，土星仍遙遙領先
articles.description: 根據國際天文學聯合會（MPC）2026 年 4 月 9 日的最新公報，天文學家在木星與土星周圍共發現了 21  […]

articles.title: 挑戰認知拒絕萎縮，長者善用 AI 訓練腦力
articles.description: 超高齡卻仍保有年輕腦力的超級長壽者（super-agers）近來再次成為焦點，而生成式 AI 也被視為可能的輔 […]

articles.title: Nakamoto taps Bitwise and Kraken for Bitcoin options strategy to hedge risk
articles.description: Nakamoto launched a Bitcoin derivatives program with Bitwise and Kraken, aiming to generate options premiums and hedge part of its BTC treasury exposure.

articles.title: Jane Street asks court to reject Terraform claims tied to UST-LUNA crash
articles.description: A filing Thursday said the lawsuit rehashes events already settled in court and seeks damages for losses caused by internal misconduct.

articles.title: Bitmine to buy 10,000 ether for $23.9 million from the Ethereum Foundation
articles.description: The transaction brings the firm’s holdings closer to its 5% of ETH target.

articles.title: South Africa draft bill would tighten crypto capital controls
articles.description: South Africa’s draft capital flow rules would bring crypto under exchange controls, with declaration duties, transaction limits and tougher penalties.

articles.title: Researcher wins 1 bitcoin bounty for 'largest quantum attack' on underlying tech
articles.description: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli broke a 15-bit elliptic curve key on publicly accessible quantum hardware, 512 times larger than the previous public demonstration in September 2025.

articles.title: Nuclear startup X-energy raises $1B in data center-driven IPO
articles.description: Amazon-backed X-energy was able to raise around 20% more money in its IPO as demand for nuclear power surges.

articles.title: Strategy stock beats Bitcoin after rising 25% in a month: BTC bottom in?
articles.description: Historically, MSTR’s outperformance signals traders are taking more risk, betting Bitcoin’s worst drawdown phase may be over.

articles.title: China’s new online marketing rules tighten ban on crypto promotions
articles.description: China’s new online marketing rules tighten an already sweeping crypto ban and place fresh pressure on financial influencers, echoing parallel crackdowns in Europe, Australia and the UK.

articles.title: ECB signs standards deals to cut digital euro integration costs
articles.description: The ECB signed deals with three standards bodies to reuse open payment standards for the digital euro and lower integration costs for banks and merchants.

articles.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
articles.description: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers.
